STIPULATED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF, POSS- ESSION AND RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES, WAIVE BACK RENT AND DAMAGES, WRIT MAY ISSUE IMMEDIATELY, HOWEVER, PHYSICAL EV- ICTION STAYED TO 7/31/94. EACH PARTY BEARS THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS, MUTUAL RELEASE, JUDGMENT SHALL BE VACATED AND DISMISSED W/PREJUDICE UPON COMPLIANCE W/ THE ABOVE MENTIONED TERMS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COTTON, THOMAS L COTTON, ELEANOR M.
